base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ghost_warlock_idle — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Warlock (dark variant) — gray-cloaked caster. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Warlock (dark variant) — gray-cloaked caster; stronger spells
